author: Douglas R.
pros: Quality and consistency of delivered content is excellent. I've had a couple small changes to our requirements, and they've responded within a couple hours each time.
cons: None to speak of. I'm happy with how things are going.

description: As I previously mentioned, we have worked with ScrapeHero for the last six years, and I can say it’s been a true pleasure.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: What sets ScrapeHero apart, besides their exceptional technical capabilities, is their unwavering commitment to understanding our unique business needs. They quickly find their way in each project, identify nuances, and quickly return refined structured data that is ready for our team to work with. This level of dedication has allowed them to provide us with tailored, accurate, and highly valuable datasets that have proven instrumental in our business’ growth and increased capacity.
cons: I really do not have any dislikes. understanding that our projects are collaborative, we ask if (what is often) an unreasonable deadline can be met with the understanding that our request is challenging. Graciously, ScrapeHero has always delivered. If anything, we hope to be better customers and guide our project owners/customers to plan further ahead.

description: Appreciate the effectiveness of the tool
author: Mitchell S.
pros: Ease of use and price for what it suppies
cons: Cumbersome to engage for a person not technical

review_title: Great Service Provider for Data Scraper
author: Ethan C.
pros: They can offer different service on data scrapper.Also, they are flexible, quick to response and able to delivery high quality data.
cons: The cost and if they can offer different package to save the cost.Also, I hope we can have a portal for some quick insight, but we did not opt in such service

description: Our experience with the ScrapeHero team is great and they helped in solve challenging data extraction work. Their technical team is providing quick responses and doing their best to solve the issue.
author: Balaji S.
pros: An amazing team of Data engineers who had helped in building data extraction pipelines from challenges websites
cons: The cost of service is significantly high

description: ScrapeHero is our "Go To" source to get the latest data for our company's needs.
author: Bart K.
pros: ScrapeHero offers data sets of store listing for major gas, grocery, etc. chains. The data is provided in csv format and contains GPS information. The data is refreshed periodically. If you are looking to expand your customer base, SH has plenty channels to choose from.
cons: Contact or customer support is only via email. However, the responses are timely.

review_title: Professional and Fast Data Scraping Service
author: Carly M.
pros: These folks are on top of their game - professional, fast, and flexible.Right off the bat, I noticed these guys knew what they were doing. They've got that professional vibe going, but in a chill, approachable way. They set clear expectations, keep you in the loop, and stick to their deadlines - no unnecessary drama or surprises.Speed? Yeah, they've got that covered too. I was surprised by how quickly they got back to me whenever I reached out. And the actual work? Super-fast. Every project we worked on together was delivered right on time, or even earlier. And the data they scraped? Spot on, every single time.The real cherry on top, though, is how flexible they are. It's like they've got this superpower of adapting to whatever you throw at them. Whether it was working around my weird time zone or delivering data in a specific format I needed, they just rolled with it. No fuss, no drama, just a solid "can do" attitude.So, to sum it up, if you're on the hunt for a data scraping service, give these guys a shot. They're fast, they're professional, and they're flexible. I've been really pleased with their work and I reckon you will be too.
cons: Overall I'm happy with the service but I do think that some back and forth could have been avoided by more closely reviewing my scraping brief at the outset.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Quick and easy way to acquire location data.
cons: Nothing. I would recommend to anyone interested

review_title: My experience with ScrapeHero has been overwhelmingly positive
author: Joshua D.
pros: I needed to extract public data into a usable form. I tried to find resources to help, and after several unfortunate other options I found ScrapeHero. That was about two years ago. They are inexpensive, they know what they are doing and they do what they say they are going to do. Refreshing.
cons: I have never had actual phone or video contact with the company. That was an initial cause of suspicion, but at this point given the excellent service it is a non-issue.

review_title: Quick Efficient Data Collection For Store Locators
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: We enjoy the fast access to retailer data that we can add to our store locator. Many times retailers are slow to provide store addresses and this allows us to quickly add the locations our products are available to the store locator.
cons: There isn't anything that I can recall as a downside to the service.

review_title: Should You Use ScrapeHero? A User's Perspective
description: Good experience overall. Completely hassle-free. We're satisfied with the overall levels of service and definitely recommended.
author: Philip P.
pros: Excellent Customer Support Easy to Use and Implement - They handle everything right from the get go. Good Value for Money - For the level of service they offer, they are very competitively priced in the market.
cons: Nothing worth mentioning. Maybe it could benefit from more granular targeting options to extract specific elements based on attributes or CSS selectors.

author: Mary A.
pros: The ScrapeHero team is friendly - I like working with a real human on the other end that after a few projects, have gotten to know me and my team. They are thorough and run a strong QA process, verifying that the data meets our specifications before executing the full scrape. They also will custom clean/standardize the data according to our specifications, saving my team time.
cons: Turn-around time is generally a couple of weeks. Great fit for campaigns you have time to execute, but not a fit for rapid-turn-around situations.
author_profession: Senior Director, Digital Marketing and Revenue Operations

review_title: Scrapehero great for real estate data mining
description: I designed a method doing data analysis on current and prior real estate listings that allowed me to analyze the current local market and find value in properties where it wasn't obvious or a listing was outside my traditional "buy box". It was frustrating that several data fields that would have been easy to add were missing and I had to manually add them. It would be helpful if Scrapehero would add to their base products over time to improve them. All in all though, I am happy to have found Scrapehero and have used it to score mulitple profitable deals.
author: Gerard M.
pros: Ease of use. Pre-built interfaces with commonly used website
cons: Missing data and no obvious way to add fields. Zillow interface is good. It would be far more useful with a few extra fields

review_title: Accurate and easily accessible for a fair price
author: David D.
pros: The ease of use and generous (data) offerings has made my job a lot easier throughout the years.
cons: Dataset prices are competitive with peers, but higher than I would like.

review_title: Scrape Hero for Google Review Data
author: Ryan S.
pros: I like that my queries are saved so I just need to click once to trigger a common extraction request.
cons: I would like to see some better organization of the google review data. After I extract it, I have sort the data by the time frame the review was recorded.

description: I have been very happy with ScrapeHero, The data is accurate, it is easy for me to order and pay for the files I receive and my projects are completed quickly.
author: Dean H.
pros: ScrapeHero helps us to monitor the locations of specific types of medical clinics so we can better know the competitive landscape of markets that are clients are interested in.
cons: In my 2+ years as a ScrapeHero customer I have not yet run into any problems with them. They are accurate, fit my budget and complete my projects in a timely manner.

author: Vishnu A.
pros: Quality: Their data quality is on point. Clean, consistent info - straight up saves us a ton of time. Effortless: Forget the technical stuff, ScrapeHero takes care of it. We just tell them what we need. Hassle-free: The whole process is smooth sailing. Seriously, minimal effort needed on our end.
cons: Honestly, there's not much to dislike. ScrapeHero has consistently delivered on their promises.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: My experience has been positive. The data is accurate and updated on a frequent basis.
author: Tony L.
pros: Fast, Efficient and good value for the money.
cons: The link to ScrapeHero data expired. This was an unpleasant surprise.

review_title: Worry free data - didn't have to do a thing !
description: We were looking to get an edge in our online sales which despite our best efforts in SEO, software etc were lacking just a bit for us to lose sales. We figured a 10 cent difference in price makes or loses a sale. We tried various "out of the box" solutions but the data wasnt updated as frequently as we would have liked. We went online to look for a solution and reached out to 5 vendors at the same time. The first response back was from ScrapeHero - within 5 minutes that too. 2 didnt even respond back and 2 others responded after 2 and 3 days. Their responsiveness and pricing were great (not the cheapest but it is worth the extra bit). We have been using their solution for a few months now and it is a good time to get them some feedback. Thanks
author: Walter H.
pros: Amazing responsiveness and customer care. The Data as a Service concept just works.
cons: It is not in our control and we are slowly getting used to not running our own servers and data centers (AWS), not hosting exchange for email (Office 365) and Accounting (QBO), so SaaS just takes getting used to. It isn't bad
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Ben P.
pros: -Very low cost to setup -Super large sample of store and database
cons: -Unsure of what happens if store sample updates and how our sample we reflects these changes

description: Excellent. We consistently get good scraped data.
author: Chris N.
pros: Websites like redfin and zillow do not export most sold comps in most counties to excel. This helps with that.
cons: Initial learning curve was not steep but it did require some tweaking.

author: David R.
pros: ease of use and time it took to get my list
cons: expensive, money , paying large amount for a list etc

review_title: Good price for checking historical pricing and who led, but difficult to sift thru data
description: Had an overall positive experience with scrapehero, but ultimately found a solution better for us.
author: Steve S.
pros: When you need to dive in and pivot the data to see who led, its great for that.
cons: However since the data only comes as a CSV File, it is not the ideal tool to open and see who is violating.
author_profession: Director, key Accounts and Business Development

author: Keir H.
pros: Accurate data and great breadth available. Accurate.
cons: Check out process when purchasing products a little unreliable at times

review_title: good to use as a bolt on to rpa in hrms
description: good for rpa optimization in HRIS and FI use cases
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: have used scrapehero for a pilot to pull contract stabs at a hris company and convert them into structured data feeds entering a AR module of a CRM to keep track of incoming revenue. Has good parsers available for document to text conversion
cons: limited functionality in terms of what it can do with RPA, it is difficult to implement in use cases that are non traditional
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
